text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, as the Tokyo Daishoten draws near...

text_block_list.name: TV Male Reporter
text_block_list.text:
I think it's safe to say that Oguri Cap made quite
the impact this year! What does she have in store
for us at the Arima Kinen?

text_block_list.name: TV Female Reporter
text_block_list.text:
Considering that Tamamo Cross has announced
she'll be taking some time off after this race...

text_block_list.name: TV Female Reporter
text_block_list.text:
The clash is slated to be a highlight of their
generation. It'll be the third time Tamamo Cross
and Oguri Cap face off.

text_block_list.name: TV Male Reporter
text_block_list.text:
With Super Creek now in the running too, how
will the top junior-year runner fare?

text_block_list.name: TV Male Reporter
text_block_list.text:
Things will get even more interesting if Inari One
decides to compete. My expectations for next
year are high...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The talk about the Arima Kinen mounts with
every passing day. Excitement surrounding the
race greatly exceeds past years.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Wow, Oguri and Creek are in the spotlight now!
Those two really are a big deal!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
I might not be running with 'em, but seein' them
kickin' up such a ruckus makes me wanna get out
there 'n' win even more!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
By sheer coincidence, Inari One is close with many
of the projected favorites for this year's Arima
Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tamamo Cross—famed for her lightning-quick
speed and impressive track record—has many
hailing her as the peak of Japan's racing scene as
of late.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Super Creek—a runner with a keen sense and
plenty of endurance— has climbed up the ranks in
record time.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And the Beast who's plowed her way to the center
of everyone's attention... Oguri Cap.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Inari One is particularly close with Oguri Cap and
Super Creek. The three consider each other good
friends and rivals.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Ya know, I wonder if it's fate sometimes.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Nah, maybe... inevitability is the better word
more like.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Remember the day ya first showed me around
Tracen? We saw Oguri and Creek in the middle of
a partner run.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Remember the day ya first showed me around
Tracen? We saw Oguri and Creek in the middle of
a partner run.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: I kinda... felt somethin' strange watching 'em.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
I couldn't put my finger on it back then... But now
I feel like I'm startin' to understand.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Back then, I had this sudden idea like we're all
"fated" to compete one day.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
But now I feel like it's "inevitable" that future race
is gonna become this humongous festival.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
...Haha! Listen to me, jabberin' on with this
nonsense! You can forget about all that...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If Inari One continues to compete in the centrals
through her senior year, she'll be up against some
of the best runners, including Oguri Cap.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The same people who gave her the push to enroll
in Tracen will reappear as formidable foes. It's
almost as though...
choice_data_list: I think it's both fate and inevitability.
I think it's both fate and inevitability.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. I can't wait to face off with them in my
senior year.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: But before that, we got a goal to achieve this year!
choice_data_list: Right. Let's win the Tokyo Daishoten.
Right. Let's win the Tokyo Daishoten.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! I wanna enter my senior year standin' on
top of the regionals! Let's finish off with a bang!
